'''batafa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:seabed|seabed]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-t-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:seabed|seabed]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| batafa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bætæfæth|bætæfæth]] || [[word:bætæfæj|bætæfæj]] || [[word:bætæfæsh|bætæfæsh]] || [[word:bætæfæ|bætæfæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:batatafath|batatafath]] || [[word:batatafaj|batatafaj]] || [[word:batatafash|batatafash]] || [[word:batatafa|batatafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:batafath|batafath]] || [[word:batafaj|batafaj]] || [[word:batafash|batafash]] || [[word:batafa|batafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bataffath|bataffath]] || [[word:bataffaj|bataffaj]] || [[word:bataffash|bataffash]] || [[word:bataffaf|bataffaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:batafatha|batafatha]] || [[word:batafaja|batafaja]] || [[word:batafasha|batafasha]] || [[word:batafaka|batafaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:batafath|batafath]] || [[word:batafaj|batafaj]] || [[word:batafash|batafash]] || [[word:batafa|batafa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:batafathal|batafathal]] || [[word:batafajal|batafajal]] || [[word:batafashal|batafashal]] || [[word:batafakal|batafakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:batafathatha|batafathatha]] || [[word:batafajaja|batafajaja]] || [[word:batafashasha|batafashasha]] || [[word:batafaka|batafaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:batafathan|batafathan]] || [[word:batafajan|batafajan]] || [[word:batafashan|batafashan]] || [[word:batafakan|batafakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:batafathaoro|batafathaoro]] || [[word:batafajaoro|batafajaoro]] || [[word:batafashaoro|batafashaoro]] || [[word:batafakaoro|batafakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
